libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest runtime, set system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for version 5.0.1. Prefer local Vert.x HttpServer-based tests for GET/POST, JSON/body codecs, forms/multipart, redirects, sessions/cookies, and caching; avoid relying on external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The OAuth2WebClient API references optional `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2`; do not generate OAuth2-specific tests unless that optional dependency is intentionally added.
The existing 5.0.0 build.gradle only applies the Netty Java 25 native runtime properties when `libraryVersion == '5.0.0'`, so a 5.0.1 run can miss them unless the generated setup accounts for 5.0.1.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves through vertx-core:5.0.1 to Netty 4.2.2.Final; like the existing 5.0.0 test setup, Java 25 native-image runs need Netty unsafe/reflection system properties. No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is needed for meaningful WebClient coverage because tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer.
